zh.Montbeliard, Doubs, France: 法國福朗-可特艾度布斯蒙特貝利亞德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Renaud de Bourgogne於大約1255年出生在法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易哈隆-素-薩o時，他的父親Hughes de Chalons36歲，母親Adelaide de Bourgogne I36歲。他於1282年5月15日與Guillemette de Neuchâtel在法國福朗-可特艾度布斯蒙特貝利亞德結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1322年8月9日享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Renaud de Bourgogne于大约1255年出生在法国布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易哈隆-素-薩o时，他的父亲Hughes de Chalons36岁，母亲Adelaide de Bourgogne I36岁。他于1282年5月15日与Guillemette de Neuchâtel在法国福朗-可特艾度布斯蒙特貝利亞德结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于1322年8月9日享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bourgogne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bourgoin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphee, Alyre, Andre, Armand, Aurore, Celina, Emile, Gilberte, Jacques, Laurent, Lucienne, Olivier.

variant of Bourgouin (and, in North America, an altered form of this), a habitational name for someone from Burgundy (Old French Bourgogne), a region of eastern France having Dijon as its center. The area was invaded by the Burgundii, an ancient Germanic tribe from whom it takes its name, in about AD 480. The duchy of Burgundy, created in 877 by Charles II, King of the Western Franks, was extremely powerful in the later Middle Ages, especially under Philip the Bold (1342–1404; duke from 1363). Compare Bourgoyne and Bourguignon .

nameMeanings.name: Renaud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Renaud de Bourgogne was born about 1255, in Chalon-sur-Saône, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, his father, Hughes de Chalons, was 36 and his mother, Adelaide de Bourgogne I, was 36. He married Guillemette de Neuchâtel on 15 May 1282, in Montbéliard, Doubs, Franche-Comté, France. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died on 9 August 1322, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Renaud de Bourgogne est né environ 1255, à Chalon-sur-Saône, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, son père, Hughes de Chalons, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Adelaide de Bourgogne I, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Guillemette de Neuchâtel le 15 mai 1282, à Montbéliard, Doubs, Franche-Comté, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé le 9 août 1322, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Renaud de Bourgogne um 1255 in Chalon-sur-Saône, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hughes de Chalons 36 und seine Mutter Adelaide de Bourgogne I 36. Er hat am 15. Mai 1282 in Montbéliard, Doubs, Franche-Comté, Frankreich Guillemette de Neuchâtel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb am 9. August 1322 im Alter von 68 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Renaud de Bourgogne è nato il circa 1255 nel Chalon-sur-Saône, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, il suo padre, Hughes de Chalons, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Adelaide de Bourgogne I, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Guillemette de Neuchâtel il 15 maggio 1282, nel Montbéliard, Doubs, Franche-Comté, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì il 9 agosto 1322, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Renaud de Bourgogneが約1255年にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeサoネ-エト-ロイアーチャロン-スル-サoンで生まれた時，父Hughes de Chalonsは36歳，母Adelaide de Bourgogne Iは36歳であった。1282年5月15日にフランスフランチェ-コムトeドウブズモントブeリアルドでGuillemette de Neuchâtelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1322年8月9日に68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Renaud de Bourgogne(이)가 대략 1255년 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 사o니-트-로이르 차론-수-사o니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hughes de Chalons(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelaide de Bourgogne I(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1282년 5월 15일 프랑스 프랭체-코트e 다브스 몽브e리아르드에서 Guillemette de Neuchâtel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1322년 8월 9일 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Renaud de Bourgogne nasceu aproximadamente 1255, em Chalon-sur-Saône, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, seu pai, Hughes de Chalons, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Adelaide de Bourgogne I, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Guillemette de Neuchâtel em 15 de maio de 1282, em Montbéliard, Doubs, Franche-Comté, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de agosto de 1322, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Renaud de Bourgogne родился около 1255 г. в местности халон-сур-саoн, саoне-ет-лоир, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция, его отцу по имени Hughes de Chalons было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelaide de Bourgogne I, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Guillemette de Neuchâtel 15 мая 1282 г. в местности монтбeлярд, доубс, фрэнче-комтe, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер 9 августа 1322 г. в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Renaud de Bourgogne nació aproximadamente 1255, en Chalon-sur-Saône, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, su papá, Hughes de Chalons, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Adelaide de Bourgogne I, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Guillemette de Neuchâtel el 15 de mayo de 1282, en Montbéliard, Doubs, Franche-Comté, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió el 9 de agosto de 1322, a la edad de 68 años.
